## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Review Notes

Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to, such as public
wording, product behavior, security-sensitive details, links, downloads, or
translations.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked the affected links and public references
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, customer data, or internal-only details
- [ ] I updated related documentation or translations where applicable
